summary: Iteration 46 - Tested 5 data inconsistency fixes. All backend tests (16/16) passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.

GET /api/members/stats.details: Returns correct counts: total=326, active_members=66, active_coaches=29, departed=226, expired_members=5, expiring_30d=0

GET /api/members/memberships.details: Returns 26 unique membership types sorted alphabetically (HUBFIT, HYBRID FULL, OPEN GYM, THE COACH PASS, etc.)

GET /api/courses (year=2026, month=1).details: Returns 20 courses for January 2026 with attendance_rate field

GET /api/members (is_coach field).details: All members have is_coach computed field based on membership type (THE COACH, VIRTUAL COACH)

dashboard_real_time_stats.details: Dashboard KPI grid shows real-time member stats: Membres actifs=66, Coachs actifs=29 (from /api/members/stats)

members_page_stat_cards.details: MembersPage shows correct stats: Actifs=66, Coachs=29, Expirés=5, Partis=226, Tous=100

membership_filter_dropdown.details: Membership filter shows 27 options (26 memberships + 'Tous les abonnements'). Filtering by HUBFIT works correctly.

departed_tab.details: Departed tab shows '226 résultats' - correctly filtering members with exit_date

courses_attendance_rate_format.details: Attendance rate column shows values formatted to 1 decimal place (e.g., 26.9%, 53.8%, 0.0%, 23.1%, 10.3%)

features_verified: 1. Dashboard shows real-time member stats from /api/members/stats endpoint (66 active, 29 coaches)
2. GET /api/members/stats returns correct counts: active_members=66, active_coaches=29, departed=226, expired_members=5
3. GET /api/members/memberships returns 26 unique membership names sorted alphabetically
4. MembersPage stat cards show correct numbers: Actifs=66, Coachs=29, Expirés=5, Partis=226, Tous=100
5. MembersPage membership filter dropdown shows 26 subscription types
6. MembersPage departed tab shows 226 departed members
7. CoursesPage shows 20 courses for current month with attendance rates formatted to 1 decimal (e.g., 46.2%)
seed_data_creation: No new test data created - tested existing imported data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 data inconsistency fixes verified working. Key data: (1) Total members=326, departed=226, current=100 (66 active members + 29 coaches + 5 expired). (2) 26 unique membership types from /api/members/memberships. (3) Dashboard uses real-time /api/members/stats instead of static KPIs. (4) CoursesPage uses toFixed(1) for attendance rate display. (5) MembersPage correctly categorizes members: departed (exit_date set), coaches (is_coach=true based on THE COACH/VIRTUAL COACH membership), active vs expired (subscription_end_date comparison).
